author: David Leisering
title: Bubba Chandler has solid outing in no-decision Saturday
desc: Bubba Chandler allowed two runs on three hits, walked one, and struck out six in 5.2 innings on Saturday. He had to settle for a no-decision in the Pirates' 3-2 win over the Marlins.
impact: Chandler has pitched better in June, going 1-1 with a 4.50 ERA and a 0.94 WHIP in three appearances (two starts). More importantly, however, is that he has posted a 16:5 K:BB ratio in 16 innings during the stretch. The young righthander will take a 2-7 record and a 4.76 ERA into his next scheduled start in Colorado on Friday.

author: David Leisering
title: Gregory Soto collects tenth save of season Saturday
desc: Gregory Soto tossed a scoreless ninth to earn his 10th save of the season and to preserve a 3-2 victory over the Marlins on Saturday.
impact: Soto allowed a leadoff single to Esteury Ruiz, who then followed that up with a steal of second with nobody out in the top of the ninth. However, the Marlins were unable to scratch across the tying run. Soto has made four appearances this month and has pitched to a 16.88 ERA, allowing five runs on six hits in 2.2 innings. Overall, however, Soto has been quite good, going 4-1 with 10 saves, a 3.26 ERA, a 0.92 WHIP, and a 35:12 K:BB ratio across 30.1 innings of work this season. He has supplanted Dennis Santana as the primary closer in Pittsburgh.

author: David Leisering
title: Spencer Horwitz scores twice, plates winning run Saturday
desc: Spencer Horwitz went 1-for-3 and had a hand in all three Pirates' runs on Saturday in a 3-2 win over the Marlins.
impact: Horwitz was hit by a pitch in the first and came in to score on an RBI single from Ryan O'Hearn. He then singled in the third and later scored on a double by Bryan Reynolds. Finally, with the game still tied at 2-2 in the eighth, Horwitz was again hit by a pitch - this time with the bases loaded - to bring home the eventual game-winning run. Horwitz could be looking at a breakout campaign in 2026 as he is batting .286 with nine homers and 31 runs batted in through 65 games. He hit a career-high 12 home runs in 2024 and drove in a career-best 51 runs last season.

author: Nate Miller
title: Michael Harris II smokes solo homer in Saturday's win
desc: Michael Harris II went 1-for-4 with a solo home run in Saturday's 3-1 win over the Mets.
impact: Harris went hitless with two strikeouts over his first three at-bats Saturday, but he made the final plate appearance count. The dynamic center fielder belted a solo shot in the eighth inning that ran the Braves' advantage to 3-1. Harris is now sports a solid .850 OPS with 14 homers through 66 games, as he continues a very strong campaign to this point.

author: Nate Miller
title: Eli White homers in three-hit performance Saturday
desc: Eli White went 3-for-4 with a solo homer, a pair of doubles, and two RBI in Saturday's 3-1 win over the Mets.
impact: Getting the start with a lefty on the mound for the Mets, White stepped up and delivered his first three-hit game of the season. All three knocks were of the extra-base variety, and the Braves could certainly use more of that with typical right fielder Ronald Acuna Jr. (hamstring) on the IL. White has now posted a .730 OPS with three homers and 14 RBI through 85 plate appearances.

author: Nate Miller
title: Raisel Iglesias finishes off Mets on Saturday
desc: Raisel Iglesias allowed one hit and one walk during a scoreless ninth inning to earn a save in Saturday's 3-1 win over the Mets.
impact: Working for the first time since taking a loss in this past Tuesday's extra-inning loss to the White Sox, Iglesias made things a bit dramatic in Saturday's win, but he ultimately buckled down to come away with his 14th save of the season. The veteran closer currently sports an elite 1.16 ERA with 27 strikeouts through 23 1/3 innings this season.

author: Ari Koslow
title: Heliot Ramos (quad) could begin rehab assignment next week
desc: Heliot Ramos could start a rehab assignment next week.
impact: Ramos is working his way back from a quad strain. He'll likely need to play in at least a handful of rehab games before he is activated.

author: Ari Koslow
title: Xander Bogaerts leaves game early Saturday
desc: Xander Bogaerts exited Saturday's game against the Orioles in the sixth inning.
impact: Bogaerts was removed one inning after he was hit by a pitch. He'll continue to be further evaluated.

author: Ari Koslow
title: Chase DeLauter leaves game early Saturday
desc: Chase DeLauter left Saturday's game in the first inning with an apparent injury.
impact: DeLauter will continue to be further evaluated. There will be an update provided on his status when available.

author: Ari Koslow
title: Angel Martinez exits game early Saturday
desc: Angel Martínez left Saturday's game after two innings with an apparent foot injury.
impact: Martínez fouled a pitch off his foot in the first inning. He'll continue to be further evaluated.

author: Nate Miller
title: Martin Perez delivers olid effort in Saturday's win
desc: Martin Perez was charged with one run on four hits and one walk while striking out four over 5 1/3 innings in Saturday's 3-1 win over the Mets.
impact: Perez continues to provide stability at the back of the Braves' rotation. The veteran southpaw fired five scoreless frames before being tagged with a run that came around to score after he exited in the sixth inning. Perez is now 5-3 with Saturday's victory, sporting a nice 2.90 ERA and 1.05 WHIP through 62 innings this season.

author: Ari Koslow
title: Coleman Crow (flexor strain) to resume throwing in a few days
desc: Coleman Crow is expected to resume throwing in a few days.
impact: Crow landed on the injured list with a flexor strain. He remains without a clear timetable to return.

author: Ari Koslow
title: Valente Bellozo sent outright to Triple-A
desc: The Rockies sent RHP Valente Bellozo outright to Triple-A Albuquerque.
impact: Bellozo will remain in the Rockies organization, but off their 40-man roster.

author: Ari Koslow
title: Jeff Criswell optioned to Triple-A
desc: The Rockies optioned RHP Jeff Criswell to Triple-A Albuquerque.
impact: Criswell will head back to Triple-A. He should get another opportunity in the majors later in the summer.

author: Ari Koslow
title: Eiberson Castellano has contract selected by Rockies
desc: The Rockies selected the contract of RHP Eiberson Castellano from Triple-A Albuquerque.
impact: Castellano will be making his major league debut when he first gets into a game.
